providers.notes: Have cutting-edge gemini text/image models for free use , with a small number of free requests
open-source models available. iFlow API end at 2026/4/17
KAT-Coder model. Need login to get model name, only KAT-Coder-Air-V1 free
Free quota per day: 500K computing units
for text: 1,000 RPM 50,000 TPM. for image: 2 IPM ,400 IPD.
15 yuan on registration, for free use: 3 RPM; 500,000 TPM; 1,500,000 TPD
RPM 20 - 40, RPD 40, TPD 200000 for free use
